title: vicia gemella subsp. gracilis
intro: Vicia gemella subsp. gracilis, also known as slender twin vetch, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating respiratory issues, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing stress. In herbal preparations, Vicia gemella subsp. gracilis is often used as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
